channel.title: LLM Releases
channel.description: New model releases across AWS Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure OpenAI, and Anthropic

item.title: [Launched] Generally available: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 on Azure Databricks
item.description: Azure Databricks now supports Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 through Azure Databricks AI Model Serving. Claude Opus 4.7 is Anthropic's most capable hybrid reasoning model, delivering stronger performance on complex extraction and agentic reasoning tasks while

item.title: Claude Opus 4.7 is now available in Amazon Bedrock
item.description: Amazon Bedrock, the platform for building AI applications and agents at production scale, now offers Claude Opus 4.7-- Anthropic's most capable Opus model to date -- delivering meaningful improvements across agentic coding, professional work, and long-running tasks for developers and enterprises building production AI applications. Claude Opus 4.7 is an upgrade from Claude Opus 4.6, with stronger performance across the workflows teams run in production. Opus 4.7 works better through ambiguity,

item.title: Amazon Bedrock now offers Claude Mythos Preview (Gated Research Preview)
item.description: Amazon Bedrock, the platform for building generative AI applications and agents at production scale, now offers Claude Mythos Preview in gated research preview as part of Project Glasswing. Claude Mythos Preview is Anthropic's most advanced AI model to date, representing a fundamentally new model class with state-of-the-art capabilities across cybersecurity, software coding, and complex reasoning tasks. The model can identify sophisticated security vulnerabilities in software and demonstrate exp

item.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now available on Azure Databricks
item.description: Azure Databricks now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6 through Azure Databricks AI Model Serving. Claude Sonnet 4.6 delivers frontier-level performance on complex coding, agentic workflows, and professional knowledge work including reasoning at a lower

item.title: [Launched] ​Generally Available: Claude Opus 4.6 now available on Azure Databricks
item.description: Azure Databricks now supports Anthropic Claude Opus 4.6 through Mosaic AI Model serving. Claude Opus 4.6 is Anthropic's most advanced model, delivering state-of-the-art performance on agentic coding, complex reasoning, and knowledge work tasks. The model

item.title: DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp is available through Model Garden.
item.description: DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp is available through Model Garden.

item.title: DeepSeek-V3.1-Terminus is available through Model Garden.
item.description: DeepSeek-V3.1-Terminus is available through Model Garden.

item.title: EmbeddingGemma and DeepSeek-V3.1 models are available through Model Garden.
item.description: EmbeddingGemma and DeepSeek-V3.1 models are available through Model Garden.

item.title: Gemma 3 270M, Wan 2.2 and Wan 2.1 models are available through Model Garden.
item.description: Gemma 3 270M, Wan 2.2 and Wan 2.1 models are available through Model Garden.

item.title: OpenAI's gpt-oss-120b and gpt-oss-20b are available as Model as a Service (MaaS) models in Model Garden.
item.description: OpenAI's gpt-oss-120b and gpt-oss-20b are available as Model as a Service (MaaS) models in Model Garden.

item.title: OpenAI's gpt-oss models are available through Model Garden.
item.description: OpenAI's gpt-oss models are available through Model Garden.

item.title: The global endpoint is generally available (GA) for Anthropic's Claude Opus 4. For details, see Global endpoint.
item.description: The global endpoint is generally available (GA) for Anthropic's Claude Opus 4. For details, see Global endpoint.

item.title: Gemma 3n models are available through Model Garden.
item.description: Gemma 3n models are available through Model Garden.
